story.text:
# 💡 C49 · Bakhta-Response · B
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Second member of the renumbered Bakhta-response family. Provisional (60%). Half-life decay under repeated witnessing (Tome II Act II.7).

## Edges in

- [[Tome II Act 6: The Fourth Aging Category]] *introduces* →
- [[C84 · Existence-Leak Discount]] *relates_to* →
